WritingDesignPrinciplesNowTimeline

Now

Last updated Sep 12th, 2023.

I update my now page a few times a year to share a little bit about my current state. It’s largely inspired by Derek Sivers.

  • Designing software products at CommandBar.
  • Sold Building Simple Goods.
  • Published a short book: Renovating Old Houses.
  • Renovating a hundred year old house.
  • Living in the Pacific Northwest with my wife, two daughters, and a dog.
  • Previously Product + Design at Buffer.
